basic_details.job_title: NCLT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 106 Staff Car Driver, UDC and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), New Delhi
basic_details.post_name: Joint Registrar, Deputy Registrar, Assistant Registrar, Programmer, Court Officer, Private Secretary, Senior Legal Assistant, Assistant, Stenographer Grade-I/Personal Assistant, Cashier, Record Assistant, Upper Division Clerk, Staff Car Driver
basic_details.department: National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Govt. of India
basic_details.short_information: NCLT is recruiting various posts from Joint Registrar to Staff Car Driver on deputation/absorption basis across multiple Benches in India, last date 60 days from publication in Employment News.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 60 days from the date of publication in Employment News / Rozgar Samachar
important_dates.maximum age cut-off date: Closing date of receipt of applications (must be below 56 years)

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. This is a deputation/absorption recruitment for serving government officers; no fee is applicable.

age_limit.age_details: 56 years as on the closing date of receipt of applications
age_limit.details: Note: Total deputation period (including any preceding ex-cadre deputation immediately before this appointment) shall ordinarily not exceed three years.

qualification.details: All posts are to be filled on deputation/absorption basis only. Only officers/officials already serving in Central Government, State Governments, Union Territories, Courts, Tribunals or Statutory Organisations are eligible. Departmental officers in the feeder grade who are in the direct line of promotion are NOT eligible for deputation. Age must not exceed 56 years as on the closing date of receipt of applications.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-2 to Level-13 (7th Central Pay Commission Pay Matrix)

selection_process: Basis of Selection Scrutiny of bio-data, service record, APAR/ACR ratings, qualifications, experience and suitability for the post
Channel Application must come through proper channel - Employer/Head of Office/Forwarding Authority must certify all particulars and enclose ACRs/APARs
Tie-Breaking Selection Committee's assessment of overall suitability, ACR/APAR grades and domain experience
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply offline only using Prescribed Application Proforma (Annexure-II). Applications must be submitted through proper channel only - via the Employer/Head of Office/Forwarding Authority. Applications sent directly by the candidate without being forwarded through proper channel will not be considered. Incomplete applications or those not accompanied by required documents will not be considered.
Step 1: Download Application Proforma (Annexure-II) and eligibility conditions (Annexure-I) from www.nclt.gov.in under "Career".
Step 2: Fill in Annexure-II completely. Attach self-attested passport size coloured photograph. State clearly in Section 19 how you are best suited for the post.
important_instructions: Applications must be submitted through proper channel only - via Employer/Head of Office/Forwarding Authority. Direct applications will not be accepted. Candidates who apply will NOT be allowed to withdraw their application subsequently. Candidates unwilling to join upon selection must NOT apply. Absorption into NCLT is NOT a matter of right. It will be done only based on NCLT's need and as per NCLT Recruitment Rules 2020. Absorption can be considered only after 1 year of satisfactory deputation. Vacancy position is tentative and may increase or decrease. Selected candidates will serve only at the specific NCLT Bench for which they are selected. GPRA benefit: Only officers already availing GPRA in their parent body can continue this benefit after joining NCLT on deputation. Others are not eligible to apply for GPRA on joining NCLT. Cadre authorities must verify that all particulars sent by their officers are correct as per official records before forwarding applications. Pre-01.01.2016 regular service will be treated as service in the corresponding level of the 7th CPC pay matrix for eligibility determination. NCLT Recruitment Rules 2020 are available on www.nclt.gov.in under "Career" - candidates must read these before applying. Applications not accompanied by all required documents, or received after the last date, will not be considered under any circumstances. All corrigenda/updates will be published on www.nclt.gov.in - visit regularly.
